match_nodes.description: ITSG-33 — IT Security Risk Management security control catalogue

data.official_name: IT Security Risk Management: A Lifecycle Approach (ITSG-33)
data.notes: Canada's federal security control catalogue and risk-management methodology, roughly analogous in role to NIST SP 800-53/800-37 for the US federal government.

Jointly published with Treasury Board Secretariat and Shared Services Canada under the GC Cloud Adoption Strategy. Defines mandatory security controls for hosting Protected B (medium-sensitivity) government data in public cloud.
